已成功完成企业公告中英双语简版输出任务。生成了3种常见企业公告的中英双语模板，包括：组织架构调整公告、产品发布公告、办公室搬迁公告。每个模板都包含中文版和英文版，保持语义一致，语言简洁专业。
result.deliverables:
# 企业公告中英双语简版输出

## 模板一：组织架构调整公告

**【中文版】**
> 关于公司组织架构调整的公告
>
> 各位同事：
>
> 为进一步提升运营效率，优化资源配置，经公司管理层研究决定，自即日起对公司组织架构进行调整，现将相关内容公告如下：
>
> 一、组织架构调整方案
> 二、人事任免决定
> 三、相关业务调整安排
>
> 请各部门相互配合，妥善安排工作交接，确保业务平稳过渡。如有疑问，请联系HR部门。
>
> 特此公告。
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

**【英文版】**
> Announcement on Organizational Restructuring
>
>> To further improve operational efficiency and optimize resource allocation, the Dear All,
>
 management has decided to adjust the company's organizational structure, effective immediately. The relevant details are hereby announced as follows:
>
> 1. Organizational Restructuring Plan
> 2. Personnel Appointments and Removals
> 3. Business Adjustment Arrangements
>
> All departments are requested to cooperate and arrange proper work handover to ensure smooth business transition. Should you have any questions, please contact the HR department.
>
> Sincerely,
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

## 模板二：产品发布公告

**【中文版】**
> 新品发布公告
>
> 尊敬的客户及合作伙伴：
>
> 感谢您一直以来的支持与信任！我司正式宣布，全新产品/服务将于[发布日期]正式上线。
>
> 产品/服务名称：[产品名称]
> 产品/服务亮点：
> • [亮点1]
> • [亮点2]
> • [亮点3]
>
> 了解更多详情，请访问：[官网链接] 或致电：[客服热线]
>
> 期待与您共同开启全新体验！
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

**【英文版】**
> Product Launch Announcement
>
> Dear Valued Customers and Partners,
>
> Thank you for your continued support and trust! We are pleased to announce that our brand new product/service will officially launch on [Date].
>
> Product/Service Name: [Product Name]
> Key Features:
> • [Feature 1]
> • [Feature 2]
> • [Feature 3]
>
> For more information, please visit: [Website] or call: [Hotline]
>
> We look forward to embarking on this new journey with you!
>
> Sincerely,
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

## 模板三：办公室搬迁公告

**【中文版】**
> 关于公司搬迁新址的公告
>
> 各位员工、客户及合作伙伴：
>
> 因公司业务发展需要，我司将于[日期]正式搬迁至新办公地址，现将相关事项公告如下：
>
> 新办公地址：[详细地址]
> 联系电话：[电话号码]
> 生效日期：[日期]
>
> 搬迁期间给您带来的不便，敬请谅解。期待在新址与您继续携手合作！
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

**【英文版】**
> Announcement of Office Relocation
>
> Dear Employees, Customers and Partners,
>
> Due to business development needs, our company will relocate to a new office address on [Date]. The relevant information is hereby announced as follows:
>
> New Address: [Detailed Address]
> Contact Number: [Phone Number]
> Effective Date: [Date]
>
> We apologize for any inconvenience caused during the relocation. We look forward to continuing our cooperation with you at our new location!
>
> Sincerely,
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

**使用说明：**
- 方括号内容请根据实际情况替换
- 语气：正式、简洁、专业
- 简版建议篇幅：150-300字
- 中英文段落结构保持一致

我注意到当前目录中没有现成的企业公告模板文件。基于任务要求，我将创建一个**通用企业公告模板**的中英双语简版，涵盖几种常见公告类型供您参考使用：

---

# 🏢 企业公告模板 / Corporate Announcement Template

## 模板一：组织架构调整公告 / Organizational Restructuring Announcement

**【中文版】**

> **关于公司组织架构调整的公告**
>
> 各位同事：
>
> 为进一步提升运营效率，优化资源配置，经公司管理层研究决定，自即日起对公司组织架构进行调整，现将相关内容公告如下：
>
> 一、组织架构调整方案
> [具体调整内容]
>
> 二、人事任免决定
> [相关人员调整信息]
>
> 三、相关业务调整安排
> [业务部门变动说明]
>
> 请各部门相互配合，妥善安排工作交接，确保业务平稳过渡。如有疑问，请联系HR部门。
>
> 特此公告。
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

**【英文版】**

> **Announcement on Organizational Restructuring**
>
> Dear All,
>
> To further improve operational efficiency and optimize resource allocation, the management has decided to adjust the company's organizational structure, effective immediately. The relevant details are hereby announced as follows:
>
> 1. Organizational Restructuring Plan
> [Specific adjustment details]
>
> 2. Personnel Appointments and Removals
> [Relevant personnel changes]
>
> 3. Business Adjustment Arrangements
> [Business department changes]
>
> All departments are requested to cooperate and arrange proper work handover to ensure smooth business transition. Should you have any questions, please contact the HR department.
>
>Sincerely,
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---
